Reference

Sequential Pairwise Online Rating Techniques

Various algorithms

glicko_run()

Glicko rating algorithm

glicko2_run()

Glicko2 rating algorithm

bbt_run()

Bayesian Bradley-Terry

dbl_run()

Dynamic Bayesian Logit

Ratings methods

plot(<rating>)

Plot rating object

predict(<rating>)

Predict rating model

summary(<rating>)

Summarizing rating objects

Data
